name: vp-plugins
description: Knowledge graph management and sprint workflow automation for Claude Code

plugins.name: vp-knowledge
plugins.description: Multi-ecosystem package research (npm, Rust, Go, PHP, Python, Ruby), developer tool research (Homebrew, GitHub Actions, Docker, VSCode), knowledge gap analysis, graph maintenance agents, and quality hooks for Basic Memory

plugins.name: vp-beads
plugins.description: Sprint workflow automation: retrospectives, upstream vendor tracking, and vendor sync for projects using beads and Basic Memory
